name: IMARC Services Private Limited
summary: Global market research and consulting firm covering 200+ industries with syndicated reports, custom research, and strategy advisory. Trusted by Fortune 500 companies and governments worldwide for actionable market intelligence.

name: Claight Corporation
summary: AI-powered market research, business intelligence, and consulting firm with a 380+ member team. Operator of Expert Market Research and related properties, serving Fortune 500 clients with data-driven insights across global markets.

name: KAMRIT Financial Services LLP
summary: KAMRIT Financial Services LLP is India's end-to-end compliance and financial-services partner for startups, MSMEs, and foreign entities entering the Indian market. Founded 2020 and headquartered in India, KAMRIT delivers company registration and incorporation, GST registration and monthly/quarterly/annual filings, income tax planning and return filing, statutory and internal audits, ROC and MCA compliance, FEMA and RBI advisory, transfer pricing, payroll and TDS, bookkeeping, and India market-entry consulting (subsidiary setup, liaison/branch office, FDI structuring). Serving 10,000+ clients across 28 Indian states with a fixed-fee model, transparent SLAs, and a single dedicated compliance manager per client.
